schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10 lakh seed fund + mentoring + co-working space for TN startups
schemes.benefit_hi: TN स्टार्टअप को ₹10 लाख सीड फंड + मेंटरिंग
schemes.eligibility: DPIIT-recognized startups operating in Tamil Nadu

schemes.name_en: Indira Gandhi Shehri Rojgar Guarantee Yojana
schemes.name_hi: इंदिरा गांधी शहरी रोजगार गारंटी योजना
schemes.benefit_en: 100 days guaranteed employment per year for urban families
schemes.benefit_hi: शहरी परिवारों को 100 दिन रोजगार की गारंटी

schemes.benefit_en: Online job portal + skill centres + career guidance for Delhi youth
schemes.benefit_hi: दिल्ली युवाओं के लिए ऑनलाइन जॉब पोर्टल + स्किल सेंटर

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 3,000/month (graduates) or Rs 1,500/month (diploma) for unemployed youth
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka unemployed youth (graduated within 2 years), age < 25

schemes.benefit_en: 25-35% subsidy on business loans for HP youth entrepreneurs
schemes.benefit_hi: HP युवा उद्यमियों को व्यावसायिक ऋण पर 25-35% सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: HP residents aged 18-45 starting new enterprises

schemes.benefit_en: 1 lakh youth to get skill training + tool kit + Rs 30,000 support
schemes.benefit_hi: 1 लाख युवाओं को कौशल प्रशिक्षण + टूल किट + ₹30,000
schemes.eligibility: Assam youth aged 18-40 from poor families

schemes.benefit_en: Employment guarantee + skill training for urban poor in Odisha
schemes.benefit_hi: ओडिशा शहरी गरीबों को रोजगार गारंटी + कौशल प्रशिक्षण

schemes.name_en: Annasaheb Patil Arthik Magas Vikas Mahamandal Loan
schemes.benefit_en: Low-interest loans up to Rs 10 lakh for OBC entrepreneurs
schemes.benefit_hi: OBC उद्यमियों को ₹10 लाख तक कम ब्याज ऋण
schemes.eligibility: Maharashtra OBC individuals with viable business plan

schemes.benefit_en: Employment registration, skill training, Rs 2,500-5,000 support

schemes.name_hi: ਘਰ ਘਰ ਰੋਜ਼ਗਾਰ / घर घर रोजगार पोर्टल
schemes.benefit_en: Job matching, career counselling, skill training for Punjab youth
schemes.benefit_hi: पंजाब युवाओं के लिए नौकरी मेच, करियर परामर्श

schemes.benefit_en: Incubation, seed fund up to Rs 10 lakh, mentoring for tech startups
schemes.benefit_hi: टेक स्टार्टअप को ₹10 लाख सीड फंड + मेंटरिंग

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 8,000-10,000/month stipend while learning skills at companies
schemes.eligibility: MP youth aged 18-29, Class 12 to graduate
